progress_summary: Reconciliation session after v1.3 actually shipped (526a9a2 in prod + staging — confirmed via /api/health and homepage release pill). Earlier checkpoints had v1.3 as 'launch-pending / ready-to-deploy' targeting Mon 2026-05-11; the real deploy ran ahead of schedule. Brought stale state in line: app-architect → launched/shipped/complete, git-ops → last-merge #183 → #189 with missing PR rows (#185-#189) added, project_dir paths corrected (orchestrator + git-ops both had /home/user/opchain leftover from a sandbox run), .opchain/pm.yaml advanced from v1.3.0 (now archived under previous_releases) to v1.4.0 with parent ADEV-327 + 8 PR children, sprint/PR key aligned to `prs:` across both releases. Linear ADEV-306 + children ADEV-307..310 verified already Done — release-ops auto-flow had handled them. v1.4 PR 1 (ADEV-328) is the active front-of-queue per stack-forge.checkpoint.json `pr-1-starting`; a11y cleanup (ADEV-338) is the parallelizable secondary track.

key_decisions: v1.4 theme: coverage-as-a-plugin-registry. skills/stack-forge/packs/<id>/pack.yml + reference docs replace hardcoded stack tables.
Apple/iOS ships in v1.4.0 (PR 6) — pressure-tests the kind: mobile dispatch branch. Android/Flutter/RN deferred to v1.5 once release-ops handles Play Store + EAS.

Distribution model: bundle-everything in opchain-skills.zip. Per-pack flags (skills.coverage.<pack-id>.enabled) filter what stack-forge OFFERS, not what's downloaded — keeps regulated/air-gapped installs intact.
5 skills version-bump 1.2.0 → 1.4.0 (stack-forge, api-dev, deploy-ops, app-architect, migration-ops). Other ~13 skills stay at 1.2.0.
8-PR sequencing: PRs 1-3 serial (architecture → backfill → dispatcher), PRs 4-7 parallelizable, PR 8 last (release).
ADEV-333 was created in error during scope shift; cancelled as duplicate of ADEV-332.

LHCI a11y failures on #187 (TOC touch size, code-block contrast, band labels, changelog links) are pre-existing — unrelated to the JSON-only diff. Standing up as ADEV-338 family on a separate branch off main, NOT BLOCKING v1.4.
generated_files: .checkpoints/app-architect.checkpoint.json (launch-pending → launched/shipped/complete; release_shipped_at + release_sha + next_release added to skill_state)
.checkpoints/git-ops.checkpoint.json (last-merge-#183 → #189; PRs #185-#189 added to merged_prs; project_dir corrected)
.opchain/pm.yaml (v1.3.0 archived to previous_releases; v1.4.0 active with ADEV-327 parent + 8 PRs; key renamed sprints → prs in both)
user_preferences: Pulls scope INTO releases when it expands the value prop; comfortable with bigger releases when the PR sequence is clear.
Asks sharp clarifying questions about user-visible mechanics (downloads vs visibility, plugin pattern) before approving implementation.
Wants Linear kept current with the actual plan — re-aligns tickets when scope shifts.
Approves merges promptly once CI is green; deploys are always manual.
Skips non-actionable bot replies on PRs (no noise back to LHCI bot).

next_actions: Commit reconciliation diff. Three files touched (.checkpoints/app-architect, .checkpoints/git-ops, .checkpoints/orchestrator, .opchain/pm.yaml) — one commit, message scope `chore(state)` or similar. No code change, all validators green.
Resume v1.4 PR 1 (ADEV-328) — stack-forge.checkpoint.json says `pr-1-starting / in_progress`. Read its next_actions[0] for the actual starting move.
a11y cleanup (ADEV-338) remains parallelizable — small, single PR, four commits (ADEV-339/340/341/342). Can be picked up by anyone not on the v1.4 critical path.
Either branch needs `npm install` and `npm install --prefix site` before first build (lockfile drift detected last session was npm 10→11 metadata only — discarded with git restore).
